title: Breath.
description: This datapack adds steam from the mouth in cold biomes & bubbles underwater.
body:
# 💨 Breath.

### This is a datapack that adds breathing.
### 
### You can download this datapack like mod for fabric (1.21-1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8)
### 
### I'll add images and gifs in the future.

### The datapack uses white smoke particles and bubbles.

# ☁️ Steam.

![steam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5fa8005039e3050ef212c9303bcc4f6fa5973f1.gif)

### _In cold biomes your character will be make steam._

# 🫧 Bubbles.

![bubbles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5080cd3c0b5e5d40728fec75865765edb20477e.gif)

### _Underwater your character will be make bubbles._

# 🔨 Issue tracker

### You can write about issues in my [discord channel](https://discord.gg/7eBJkzgU).
